channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Lord Sear, One of Hip-Hop Radio’s Most Distinctive Voices, Dead At 53
item.description: 🎤 Remembering a true hip-hop legend. Lord Sear's voice will forever echo through the airwaves. 🙏 #RIPLordSear

item.title: CFCF Announces New Album L.U.V.
item.description: 🚀 Dive into dreamy beats with CFCF's upcoming album L.U.V.! Let the music transport you ✨🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Lip Critic share “Jackpot,” announce NYC residency in a laundromat, boxing ring & more
item.description: 🎶 Pump up the jam with Lip Critic's unique NYC residency locations! Laundry day just got a whole lot groovier. 💃🥊 #MusicNews

item.title: Empire of the Sun Announce 2026 North American Tour
item.description: Guess who's shining bright in 2026? ✨ Empire of the Sun is hitting the road! 🌞🎶 #EmpireOfTheSunTour

item.title: American Football detail LP4 ft. mems Turnstile, Rainer Maria, Wisp (pre-order exclusive vinyl)
item.description: New American Football album incoming! 🎶 Featuring Turnstile, Rainer Maria, Wisp. Vinyl pre-order available now! 🌟 #MusicNews #VinylCollectors
